title: Oairse 4PCS Velvet Gift Boxes With Lids - Round Cardboard Nesting Box Set in Assorted Sizes 14/16/18/20cm - Red Hat Box for Flowers, Presents, Bridesmaid, Wedding, Birthday, Valentine's, Christmas
features: Size of Floral Boxes - The round boxes comes in 4 boxes with various sizes to meet your demand. XS: 14 x 14 x 8.5 cm, S: 16 x 16 x 10 cm, M: 18 x 18 x 11.5 cm, L: 20 x 20 x 13cm. Appropriate dimensions allow smaller boxes to be packed into larger boxes, so they take up little storage space.

Eco-Friendly Round Gift Boxes - These nesting gift boxes with lids are made of high quality velvet and cardboard, which are made from well-managed forests, sturdy and environmentally friendly, which can be recycled.

Perfect Decoration for Gift - These decorative round cardboard boxes are ideal choice for gift giving, retail product presentation, giveaways, packaging items. You can put your gift into these gift boxes round as bridesmaids, proposals, Christmas, Halloween, Mother's Day, birthday, anniversary, Thanksgiving , wedding, graduation, business, Wedding, Baby Showers gift, etc.

Practical Storage Boxes - These paper round boxes are roomy and can be used to store a variety of items, such as artificial flowers, watches, jewelry, small clothing accessories, gift cards, homemade crafts. You can fill some colorful shredded crinkle paper into your round box craft and tie with ribbons or twine to DIY your unique gift box.

Friendly Customer Support - The luxury gift boxes don't need to spend time to assemble and find wrapping paper to wrap your gifts, you will receive a finished empty paper round box. Custom a unique gift with our high quality gift boxes for your loved one. Any concerns or questions about these round boxes for flowers, please feel free to contact us.
